creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
stefan      2006-11-19 15:54:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns/powerdns         Makefile 
    dns/powerdns/files   configure.powerdns 
  Added files:
    dns/powerdns/files   patch-pdns_nameserver.cc 
                         patch-pdns_tcpreceiver.cc 
  Log:
  - Add patches to fix IPv6 support. [1]
  - Add a comment to mark bundled recursor as deprecated (by the author). [2]
  - s/INSTALLS_SHLIB/USE_LDCONFIG/ to satisfy portlint.
  
  PR:             105490 [1], 105491 [2]
  Submitted by:   Sten Spans<sten@blinkenlights.nl> [1], [2]
  Approved by:    maintainer [1], [2]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.50      +1 -1      ports/dns/powerdns/Makefile
  1.10      +2 -2      ports/dns/powerdns/files/configure.powerdns
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/dns/powerdns/files/patch-pdns_nameserver.cc (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/dns/powerdns/files/patch-pdns_tcpreceiver.cc (new)
